title: erythroxylum acutum
intro: Erythroxylum acutum, a species of flowering plant, is a member of the Erythroxylum genus, commonly known as the coca or cocaine plant, which has been used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids, including cocaine and other psychoactive compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including altitude sickness and fatigue. Erythroxylum acutum has been traditionally used to provide energy, relieve headaches, and improve mental clarity, although its use can also have potential side effects. Herbal preparations of Erythroxylum acutum, such as teas and infusions, are used in traditional medicine, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
